svg.text: The complete playbook for building a kawaii/collectible vendor business from zero.
Link in bio to store or Linktree
Flat lay tips: natural light, pastel background,
Cash box + change ($50 in small bills)
Front: customer-facing. Risers in back row.
QR code sign at eye level on left or right edge.
Apply for vendor table 3-6 months ahead
Email 1 (Day 0): Welcome + sticker code + brand story
Slow movers: do not reorder, bundle out
Lead time buffer: order 2-4 weeks early
Track dead stock monthly, clear at events
Back to school, Comic Con peak, restock
Order Q4 stock by August. No exceptions.
Display tiered pricing on a visible sign at events
Use slow movers + 1 guaranteed popular item
Start with 1-2 local flea markets per month
Open Etsy or Big Cartel store (low cost)
TikTok Shop + IG Shopping fully active
behike.co x onipuni.com | Made for Kawaii Vendors
